context: Evaluates whether the agent writes a _test.rego file alongside an access control policy, using the correct OPA test conventions: _test.rego filename suffix, _test package suffix, test_ function prefix, both positive and negative test cases, and passing tests.

checklist.name: _test.rego filename suffix
checklist.description: The test file is named with a `_test.rego` suffix (e.g. `authz_test.rego`) per the Regal file-missing-test-suffix convention, and the package ends in `_test` (e.g. `package rbac.authz_test`)

checklist.name: test_ function prefix
checklist.description: All test functions are prefixed with `test_` (e.g. `test_admin_allowed`, `test_viewer_denied`)

checklist.name: positive and negative test cases
checklist.description: Tests cover both the passing case (user has required role → allow is true) and the failing case (user lacks required role → allow is false), using `with input as` to inject mock input and `with data.role_permissions as` to inject mock data

checklist.name: tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
